title: Ob Khaddor

{{Quote|Here I must tell the heroic story of one rebellious but extremely talented grass painter, Ob Khaddar ''[sic]'', who was known to be a troublemaker and a radical at Alderaan University.|Hari Seldona|<ref name="ISWU" />}}
'''Ob Khaddor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an outspoken radical [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Artist/Legends|artist]] and [[Grass painting|grass painter]], most famous for having created the [[Moss painting/Legends|moss painting]] ''[[Killik Twilight]]''.

==Biography==
Ob Khaddor was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Artist/Legends|artists]] and philosophers proliferated. In his youth, Khaddor joined the renowned [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]], one of the most ancient and prestigious places of learning in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], where he built himself a reputation as a troublemaker and a radical. He became a [[Grass painting|grass painter]], a botanical artist who created giant works of art by managing the growth of various [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Grass/Legends|grass]].<ref name="ISWU" /> One of his most famous works was the ''[[Killik Twilight]]'', a [[Moss painting/Legends|moss painting]] that depicted the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]], an ancient [[Species/Legends|race]] that had once inhabited Alderaan. That [[Painting/Legends|painting]] was hung in the [[Royal Palace of Alderaan/Legends|Royal Palace]] of [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]], outside the bedroom of the young [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

He also created the [[Painting/Legends|paintings]] known as ''[[Feared]]'' and [[Fighter (painting)|''Fighter'']].<ref name="SWG:Feared">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Feared}}</ref><ref name="SWG:Fighter">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Fighter}}</ref>

One [[Standard day/Legends|day]], Khaddor was told that the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] planned a stopover on Alderaan. The artist, who had made himself famous for his overt anti-Imperial sentiments, campaigned so he would be authorized to create a painting that would "commemorate" the imminent arrival of Emperor. When Palpatine arrived on the site, he could behold a magnificent, extremely flattering portrait; however, Ob Khaddor had played a trick on the Empire. The artist had arranged things so that carefully planted [[Black lily|black lilies]] would spread open, making it look like as if the Emperor's skin was decayed and rotten.<ref name="ISWU" />

A very infuriated Palpatine ordered the whole grassplain to burned down, and the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]] apologized personally in feigned indignation. Ob Khaddor, however, did not suffer the consequences of his mockery, as he had secretly left the planet before the arrival of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] delegation. Subsequently, the Empire put a [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] on Khaddor, and numerous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] got on his track. However, Ob Khaddor's ultimate whereabouts were still unknown following the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of Alderaan in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. In a report she wrote about her defunct [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the Alderaanian [[Poet/Legends|poetess]] [[Hari Seldona]] mentioned Khaddor at great length.<ref name="ISWU" />

==Behind the scenes==
Khaddor's name is misspelled '''Ob Khaddar''' in ''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]'', ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.
